# neon_organization_member_role (Resource)

Manages the role of a Neon organization member. The member must already exist in the organization (e.g., via an accepted invitation). Destroying this resource only removes it from Terraform state; the member remains in the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_organization_member_role" "example" {
  org_id = "your-organization-id"
  member_id       = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
  role            = "member"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `member_id` (String) The organization member ID (UUID).
- `org_id` (String) The Neon organization ID.
- `role` (String) The member role. Valid values are `admin` or `member`.

### Read-Only

- `joined_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the member joined the organization, in RFC 3339 format.
- `user_id` (String) The user ID of the member.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import neon_organization_member_role.example <org_id>/<member_id>
```
